cards.title: Problem With Forced Apologies in Child Discipline
cards.body: Forced apologies are a common strategy for managing challenging child behavior, but research suggests they may not be effective. Experts recommend rethinking this approach to help children develop genuine accountability and emotional understanding.

cards.title: When Your Teen Resists Therapy, Try Curiosity
cards.body: Arguing with resistant teens rarely succeeds in getting them into therapy. Two strategies borrowed from Dialectical Behavior Therapy offer a more effective approach through curiosity rather than persuasion.

cards.title: Should Teens Share Neurodivergence in College Essays
cards.body: Disclosing neurodivergence in college applications has both advantages and disadvantages. A former admissions consultant offers insight into navigating this important decision strategically.

cards.title: Can ADHD Medication Make Autism Traits More Noticeable
cards.body: ADHD symptoms can sometimes mask autism traits, making diagnosis harder. Treatment may shift this balance and reveal previously hidden autism characteristics.

cards.title: Why Adults Need to Play
cards.body: Play isn't just for children—research shows it provides significant cognitive, physical, and social benefits for adults. Making time for playful activities is essential for overall wellbeing.

cards.title: Sensitive Teen's Self-Worth Tested by Social Media
cards.body: Parents of sensitive teens worry about their child's self-worth being damaged by social media and peer pressure. Finding community with others who share similar traits can help build confidence over time.

cards.title: Unpaid Leave to Care for Daughter During Summer Holiday
cards.body: Many parents struggle to cover the six-week summer holiday gap between organized childcare and annual leave. One parent shares her experience managing this challenging period.

cards.title: Surrogacy Challenges for Australian Families Seeking Children
cards.body: Australian families pursuing surrogacy face complex choices involving significant money and power imbalances. The Law Reform Commission is examining how to better regulate the surrogacy industry.

cards.title: Children's Laureate Patrice Lawrence Addresses Teen Masculinity
cards.body: Author Patrice Lawrence is well-suited to address the crisis of teenage masculinity and declining reading rates among young people. His bestselling novel Orangeboy resonates with youth audiences struggling with identity.

cards.title: Dyscalculia: Math Difficulty Solutions and Treatment
cards.body: Math difficulty remains poorly understood, but emerging research suggests a systems approach may improve diagnosis and treatment. Understanding dyscalculia helps parents support struggling learners.
